messages.content:
Eres un experto en el codebase de ProjectSight (Trimble Construction).
El proyecto usa .NET/C# en el backend con ASP.NET MVC/Razor y Angular en el frontend.

Reglas crûÙticas del proyecto (nunca las violes):
- Backend: Nunca uses ORM (Entity Framework, Dapper). Solo IDBHelper con stored procedures por nombre.
- Backend: Toda operaciû°n de BD va a travûˋs de stored procedures nombrados. JamûÀs inline SQL.
- Frontend: Nunca uses Angular HttpClient. Usa RxJS ajax() via APIBase / APIFactory.
- Frontend: Usa DestroyRef + subscribeTo() para subscriptions, NO Subscription arrays manuales.
- Frontend: Nunca hardcodees colores hex. Usa variables CSS de Default.css.
- No edites delta_procs.sql directamente; se genera automûÀticamente desde base_procs.sql.
- Agregar o quitar [UseInAPI] en una propiedad dispara APIClientComponentGenerator al compilar.

Cuando implementes cambios, sigue el patrû°n exacto del diff que se te proporciona.

# PR #10876: PS-69087 Phase 5: drawing rotation, quick-load PDF, PDF text extraction tests
**Tipo:** unknown
**Branch:** `wip/adam/PS-69087-phase5-coverage` ã `wip/adam/tfc-prep-non-tc-files`

## Descripciû°n
## Summary

PS-69087 Phase 5 ã fills the **None ã Direct** test coverage gap for the four FileShare-touching methods called out in `docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/test-coverage.md` rows #40, #41, #46, #68:

- `DrawingRevisionRotationHandler.ConvertCoordinatesFromRotatedMatrixToNormal` (#40)
- `DrawingRevisionRotationHandler.ConvertCoordinatesFromNormalMatrixToRotated` (#41)
- `PDFTextHandler.ExtractPDFTextSegmentsToDB` (#46)
- `ProjectSightDMSService.SaveQuickLoadPDFWithAnnotsAndRotations` (#68)

The pre-existing `[Ignore]`'d `UnitTests/DrawingTests/DrawingPageRotationTest` exercised PDFTron primitives rather than the rotation handler itself and was unsuitable as-is, so three new narrow integration tests are added instead.

## What's added

- **`Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Drawings/DrawingRevisionRotationHandlerTests.cs`** ã Stages a 90ô¯-rotated drawing PDF in `FMSDirectory` and calls the `internal` `DrawingRevisionRotationHandler.ConvertCoordinates*` methods directly (via the existing `[InternalsVisibleTo]` on `Drawings/PDFTronDocument.cs`). Asserts the rect changes via the page default matrix, via its inverse, and round-trips through both.
- **`Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Drawings/QuickLoadPDFTests.cs`** ã Drives the public `ProjectSightDMSService.SaveQuickLoadPDFWithAnnotsAndRotations` path through `DMSSystem.UpdateDMSPdfFileAsync`. Quick-uploads a PDF into `WebFileUploadDirectory`, applies an XFDF rectangle add + a 90ô¯ page rotation, and asserts the modified PDF stays in `WebFileUploadDirectory` with a different size. Companion test verifies the missing-temp-file graceful early-return.
- **`Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/PDF/PDFTextHandlerTests.cs`** ã Publishes a drawing, clears its `DrawingText` rows, then drives `PDFTextHandler.ExtractPDFTextSegmentsToDB` explicitly and asserts the searchable-text row is created (incl. the appended annotation text). Companion test verifies the missing-DMS-file early-return.
- **`docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md`** ã flips Phase 5 to `[x]` and adds a Phase 5 implementation-notes section mirroring the per-method ã test-class table style used by Phase 2 / Phase 3.

Phase 5 playlist entries already exist on the parent branch under the "PDF / annotation export" section of `PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist` (rows 40, 41, 46, 68); no playlist edit is required in this PR.

## Test plan

- [ ] Build `ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests` cleanly on a machine with the `TrimbleCloud.FileService` NuGet feed configured (this PR could not be built locally ã `NU1101: Unable to find package TrimbleCloud.FileService`).
- [ ] Run the three new test classes via `PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist` (or directly):
    - `DrawingRevisionRotationHandlerTests` ã 3 tests
    - `QuickLoadPDFTests` ã 2 tests
    - `PDFTextHandlerTests` ã 2 tests
- [ ] Confirm focused tests pass green; no broad/end-to-end suites need to run for this phase.

## Feedback de reviewers
[COMMENTED por @copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]]: ## Pull request overview

This PR expands FileShare-touching test coverage by adding new ParallelIntegrationTests around PDF/drawing rotation, quick-load PDF saving, and PDF text extraction, and updates the PS-69087 tracking docs/playlist accordingly.

**Changes:**
- Added new integration tests for `DrawingRevisionRotationHandler` coordinate transforms, `ProjectSightDMSService.SaveQuickLoadPDFWithAnnotsAndRotations`, and `PDFTextHandler.ExtractPDFTextSegmentsToDB`.
- Added additional integration tests for SiteCapture and Trimble Connect reversal scenarios.
- Introduced/updated PS-69087 coverage tracking docs and the test playlist file.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 12 out of 12 changed files in this pull request and generated 10 comments.

| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md | Adds a Phase checklist/progress tracker with Phase 5 marked implemented and notes on methodãtest mappings. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/TCMigrationReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs | Adds non-TC tests for `TCMigrationReversalSystem` using substitutes + reflection. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/QuickUploadReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs | Adds tests driving `QuickUploadReversalSystem.FetchFileFromTCAsync` via reflection. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureViewer/SiteCaptureViewerImageTests.cs | Adds SiteCapture viewer image/thumbnail staging tests. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureStationLinksTests.cs | Adds tests for station thumbnail retrieval paths returning bytes / data URLs. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureImageSupportTests.cs | Adds tests for SiteCapture image path helpers and file staging. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/Processing/CaptureProcessor/ProcessCaptureSystemPositionTests.cs | Adds a failure-path test when a drawing PDF is missing during SiteCapture processing. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Reports/SiteCaptureReportAttachmentTests.cs | Adds a report-generation test ensuring SiteCapture attachments are appended correctly. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Drawings/QuickLoadPDFTests.cs | Adds Phase 5 test cover

[... truncado 273 chars ...]

ight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/PDF/PDFTextHandlerTests.cs | Adds Phase 5 test coverage for PDF text extraction into `DrawingText`. |

[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureImageSupportTests.cs:7 por @Copilot]: The PR description focuses on Phase 5 (drawing/PDF coverage), but this PR also adds new SiteCapture integration tests. Please update the PR title/description to reflect the additional scope, or split the SiteCapture tests into a separate PR to keep review and rollout risk focused.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureViewer/SiteCaptureViewerImageTests.cs:28 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention in this repo is PascalCase sentences with no underscores. Rename this test method (and the other test(s) in this class) to remove underscores so it matches the established convention.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureStationLinksTests.cs:23 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention in this repo is PascalCase sentences with no underscores. Rename this test method (and the other test(s) in this class) to remove underscores so it matches the established convention.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/Processing/CaptureProcessor/ProcessCaptureSystemPositionTests.cs:19 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention in this repo is PascalCase sentences with no underscores. Rename this test method to remove underscores so it matches the established convention.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Reports/SiteCaptureReportAttachmentTests.cs:23 por @Copilot]: Integration test naming convention in this repo is PascalCase sentences with no underscores. Rename this test method to remove underscores so it matches the established convention.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/SiteCapture/SiteCaptureImageSupportTests.cs:27 por @Copilot]: This test method name says it validates both Low and High floor-image file names, but the assertions only cover the Low case. Either add an assertion for the High path as well, or rename the test so the name matches what is actually being validated.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Drawings/QuickLoadPDFTests.cs:73 por @Copilot]: Asserting that the PDF file size changed is a brittle proxy for ãcontent updatedã (different PDFs can be the same size, and some save paths may preserve size). Consider asserting on a stronger signal such as last-write time, a content hash, or reading back the PDF to verify the rotation/annotation was applied.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/TCMigrationReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs:131 por @Copilot]: These reflection helpers assume GetMethod() always succeeds; if the private method signature changes, the test will fail with a null dereference thatãs hard to diagnose. Add an explicit null check/assert on the MethodInfo (with a helpful message) before invoking it.
[Comentario en docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist:378 por @Copilot]: The PR description says no playlist edit is required, but this PR adds/updates the PS-69087 playlist entries (including the Phase 5 rules here). Please update the PR description (or the note in the doc) so it matches what actually changed.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/TrimbleConnect/TCMigrationReversalTestsWithoutTC.cs:131 por @Copilot]: Same as above: this reflection call assumes GetMethod() succeeds. Add a null check/assert on the MethodInfo before invoking so failures are clearer if the private method name/signature changes.
